backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing an e-commerce system with user profiles, product management, shopping cart, Stripe payment integration, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: Stripe payment integration replacing COD/UPI with automatic order confirmation, and PaymentPage.tsx updates to include Stripe as a payment method.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, hooks, and styling for the e-commerce application with Stripe integration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH-based color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with title 'GLORY 123' and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for products, cart, payment, admin, and Stripe callback pages (success/failure), wrapped in a layout with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying brand info, contact details (phone: 9892246308, address in Mumbai), social media links, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with GLORY 123 branding, navigation links to Products and Admin pages, and shopping cart icon with dynamic item count badge.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSetup.tsx: Admin component for configuring Stripe payment settings, displaying a setup form for secret key and allowed countries if Stripe is not yet configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: React hook that manages admin authentication state using sessionStorage, providing login/logout functions and checking for existing sessions on mount.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and delegation validity using the @dfinity/auth-client library.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks and mutations for interacting with the backend actor, including product search, cart management, reviews, and Stripe configuration operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a yellow/gold color theme for both light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page component with login form and product management interface, allowing authenticated admins to add products with images, names, categories, prices, and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with product details and images, quantity controls, and order summary with navigation to checkout or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying a success message with options to continue shopping or view cart after successful order placement.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure page with error explanation, troubleshooting suggestions, and navigation buttons to retry payment or return to cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that integrates Stripe checkout, displays order summary, and handles creating checkout sessions with cart items before redirecting to Stripe.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Success confirmation page shown after payment completion that invalidates cart queries and provides navigation to home or cart.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page displaying full product information, image, add-to-cart functionality, and review submission form.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListPage.tsx: Main product listing page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and grid display of products with placeholder or uploaded images.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container queries, animations, and custom design tokens for a component library.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for an e-commerce application documenting in-progress Stripe payment integration to replace Cash on Delivery/UPI methods, with known deployment issues and pending webhook implementation.
